subject: Update sli/core to use Mariadb connectori
commit_message:
Update sli/core to use Mariadb connectori

Update sli/core (including dblib, notably) to use mariadb-connector
for any jUnit tests.  Update Import-Package in dblib provider pom.xml
to import org.mariadb.jdbc so that org.mariadb.jdbc.Driver will
be resolved

Change-Id: I39dfe2cafb955ba1bf05b0ecdb0212d766fcc96c
Issue-ID: CCSDK-95
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/128/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/128

Patch Set 1:

This is the commit I was referring to in my comment on https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/13177/ (the ccsdk/distribution change).

After this one is merged, we'll need to re-release that other one to rebuild the docker container.  Learned this morning the hard way that we need to explicitly add an Import-Package for the package containing the JDBC driver we're using, otherwise the Karaf class loader won't find it when Class.forName() is called - even if that feature is included in the features.xml

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Not sure if this is related to or caused by this, but I just noticed this other error in the ccsdk-distribution-master-docker job:

Missing ':' in substitution: mariadb-java-client-${ccsdk.mysql-connector-java.version}.jar

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

This looks good to me. 

Interestingly, in appc change to mariadb, 
 mariadb-java-client was used instead of mariadb-connector-java in embed dependency. Can they be used interchangeably?
Change has been successfully merged by Marcus Williams

Patch Set 1:

I just used what policy was using and what someone else said should be used when I switched appc over

 > This looks good to me.
 > 
 > Interestingly, in appc change to mariadb,
 > mariadb-java-client was used instead of mariadb-connector-java in
 > embed dependency. Can they be used interchangeably?=

Patch Set 1:

Actually that should have been mariadb-java-client, not mariadb-connector-java.  The Embed-Dependency actually shouldn't matter, but the sli features.xml might be an issue so I'll submit a new change to fix those to be on the safe side

Patch Set 1:

Build Successful
